layers.name: decal_rift_crack
layers.description: Hairline cyan rift crack cluster on transparent background - branching micro-fractures, subtle glow, painterly stroke, matching the floor's brushwork and palette. Single decorative decal element.
layers.negative_description: tile, grid, square edges, character, person, full scene, rectangular background

layers.name: decal_rubble
layers.description: Broken granite rubble chunks and chipped oval stone fragments on transparent background - scattered cluster suitable for wall-edge scatter, painterly hand-painted, same palette and shadow direction as the floor.
layers.negative_description: tile, grid, square edges, character, person, full scene, rectangular background

layers.name: prop_statue_silhouette
layers.description: Cracked headless stone statue on small pedestal - dark stone mass silhouette, painterly painted, corner-readable as set dressing, NOT a gameplay blocker. Transparent background.
layers.negative_description: tile, grid, square edges, full scene, rectangular background, multiple statues

layers.name: accent_glow_mote
layers.description: Small cyan rift glow accent with dust motes - soft selective magical highlight, painterly, matching floor brushwork. Single ambient element on transparent background.
layers.negative_description: tile, grid, square edges, character, full scene, rectangular background
